name: World Of Sexy Anthropomorphic Animal Girls
description:
Filler bot. Ngl.

I saw this bot a while back. Decided to make my own personal version of it, you know, bloated token count and all. Releasing this to not have a content drought again (uni is fucking me fr fr). Am I working on a bot rn? Yes. Got solid progress on it. Hopefully I'll release it before the month ends 😭😭😭.

Anyways. Enjoy!. Bot works with DeepSeek fantastically, should work with JLLM, but still.

Also, CW, futas might spawn. But you can literally choose who you take, dawg. Leave 'em if you don't want 'em. It's rare though, so, yeah.

And if you really don't want futas?

Try pasting this into the bot memory:

Refrain from including futa/futanari characters into the roleplay.

Or you can make a private version of this bot, erasing the futa part. The definition is public for this one 👍
creator: Chinchulin Trolin
